game_name: Where in the World Is Carmen Sandiego?

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: player establishes identity as rookie detective
player learns that a theft has occurred and receives initial suspect gender
player learns three witness locations and begins interviewing for clues
player uses clues combined with reference almanac to determine next travel location
player enters suspect details to narrow field and obtain arrest warrant
player manages in-game clock; thief escapes if deadline is exceeded
player learns incorrect destinations yield no witness clues; requires revisiting
brief animation of V.I.L.E. henchman confirms player is tracking correct target
investigative animations turn hostile (knife throws, gunfire); witnesses warn to be careful
player selects correct location with valid warrant; police chase and apprehend thief
player answers geography question using almanac to advance rank and unlock harder cases
final case requires catching Carmen herself; success grants Hall of Fame entry

typical_relief_triggers: successful witness interview yielding new clue
Interpol database confirmation of suspect match
arrival at correct location with henchman animation
typical_tension_triggers: arrival at wrong location (no clues, time wasted)
clock approaching end of day (forced sleep)
final location reached with hostile animations
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: iterative search with accumulating pressure; each case cycles between investigation (safe), travel decision (moderate tension), confirmation/denial feedback (relief or frustration), and deadline awareness (mounting pressure)

difficulty_curve.early_game: rookie cases with fewer potential locations and more accessible clues
difficulty_curve.mid_game: intermediate cases with expanded location pool; rank promotion gates advancement requiring geography knowledge via almanac
difficulty_curve.late_game: senior cases with maximum location complexity; Carmen Sandiego final case represents ultimate challenge
notable_spikes: first case introduces all core mechanics simultaneously
each rank promotion adds significant location options and clue ambiguity
Carmen Sandiego final case combines full world map with hostile final location dynamics

notable_level_patterns.description: each case follows: alert → crime scene investigation → clue collection → Interpol narrowing → destination selection → travel → repeat until final location → apprehension with warrant
player selects from three available locations in each city; interviews yield witness clues or confirm suspect presence via animation
player must use reference book knowledge combined with witness clues to select next city; incorrect selection forces backtracking with time penalty
promotion gates lock cases behind geography questions; each rank increase adds location complexity and case difficulty

sources_used: wikipedia: Where in the World Is Carmen Sandiego? (1985 video game)
